metadata.name: Add a New General Ledger Account

description: The controller has requested a new expense account be added to the chart of accounts to track software subscription costs more accurately.

nodes.task_description: Receive the request for the new GL account, including the desired account number and description.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives the request for account '6650 - Software Subscriptions'.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the requested account number fits within the existing chart of accounts structure and does not already exist.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the number is available and appropriate.

nodes.task_description: Add the new account to the chart of accounts in the ERP system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates the new GL account.
